title: Ngoni - Studio Explorer
artifact_focus: Root-mode ngoni packet: design, BOM, validation, drawings, Wolfram starter, print packet, build-log site, and learn-to-play material.
packet_version: instrument-maker v4.3 root-mode packet; explorer R2

required_before_public: SolidWorks CAD model and browser-renderable GLB/GLTF export are pending.
Measured tuning, bridge, head, and resonator validation data are pending.
Capstone deck PPTX and print-packet PDF exports are pending.

cultural_provenance.claim: The ngoni is a living Mande harp-lute tradition. This repository documents a respectful shop-built engineering adaptation with a segmented wood bowl; it does not claim cultural authority over traditional musical or ceremonial practice.

sources.title: Repository bibliography and cultural provenance
sources.credit: See resources.md for cited ngoni and Mande music references.

sources.title: Validation report
sources.credit: Predictive packet validation; measured data remains pending.

sources.title: Public release triage
sources.credit: Readiness and public-safety assessment for the current packet.
